title: Isekai Henkyou Meshi
titleNative: 異世界辺境メシ
synopsis: A lone diner stands in the remote frontier. Drawn by the cooking of a human known only as “Master,” demons, elves, and others of all races gather to savor his food. On the stage of this small restaurant, a gourmet tale of joy and sorrow alike begins to unfold! (Source: Kodansha, translated)
synonyms: Meals on the Frontier of Another World

title: THE iDOLM@STER Cinderella Girls: U149
titleNative: アイドルマスター シンデレラガールズ U149
synopsis: Spin-off manga of THE IDOLM@STER Cinderella Girls , focusing on younger idols. The manga centers around girls under 149 centimeters tall (under about 4-feet, 11-inches) who aspire to be idols despite not having a producer or gigs. However, maybe with a marvelous dress, a marvelous stage, and a marvelous prince ... The new Cinderella story follows these small idols and their small rookie producer. (Source: Anime News Network, edited) Note: The chapter count includes 152 chapters released in magazine and 33 extra chapters.

title: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる
synonyms: After School I'll Be You
synopsis: Akiba, a high school boy who is seriously into cross-dressing cosplay, devotes himself to emulating his "oshi." Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

title: Bing Ruo Meimei Zong Shi Xiao Xiang Wo
titleRomaji: Bing Ruo Meimei Zong Shi Xiao Xiang Wo
titleNative: 病弱妹妹总是肖想我
synonyms: My Sickly Sister Always Misses Me
synopsis: Xu Yulian is the eldest daughter of a wealthy family, smart and beautiful. Her life should've been a smooth ride, until she ran into a stumbling block named "Xu Wenjiao." Her sister came out of nowhere and became the person she hates the most. When she was a child, the frail Xu Wenjiao occupied all of her mother's time and attention. After she grew up, Xu Yulian had a crush on the neighbor girl who had just returned from studying abroad. But before she could get up the courage, she saw the girl confess to Xu Wenjiao instead. In this house, it's going to be either her or Xu Wenjiao, one or the other. Xu Yulian got so angry that she actually packed her bags to leave home, but her sister, who always seemed so weak and frail, suddenly grabbed her by the wrist wrist and pushed her into the corner. Xu Wenjiao looked at her jealously and whispered in her ear: "Sister, why do you like her but not me?" Xu Yulian blushed, "Xu Wenjiao, are you crazy? Have you been reading too many bad romance novels to be acting this way?" (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Koisuru Asteroid
titleNative: 恋する小惑星
synopsis: Astronomy and geology are fun…! Mira, who promised to “find an asteroid” with the boy she found at the campsite as a child. She tried to join the astronomy club, but from this year the “astronomy club” and the “geology research society” merged into the “earth sciences club”!? Let’s go search for the asteroid that we promised to look for that day. (Source: Manga Time Kirara Carat, translated)
synonyms: 恋する小惑星〈アストロイド〉

title: Tuojiang
titleNative: 脱缰
synonyms: Mad for Love
เอาตัวรอดจากรัชทายาทคลั่งรัก
synopsis: After traveling into a historical BL novel, the actor Lin Yan gains a special ability: fast-traveling through a skill called [Escape Death]. His first mission? To secretly orchestrate an attack on Prince Qi Zhen, which leads to the prince becoming the villain. Lin Yan’s first identity in this world is none other than Lin Shou Yan, the prince’s foolish fiancé. But as he plays his role, he accidentally captures the prince’s heart, and his fake death turns out to be the key reason Qi Zhen becomes a ruthless tyrant! A cold, overthinking tsundere prince and his scheming, perverted fiancé—chaos ensues! (Source: KuiaKan Manhua, translated)

titleRomaji: Kimi ni Koi wo Suru Nante, Arienai Hazu Datta
titleNative: 君に恋をするなんて、ありえないはずだった
synonyms: I was supposed to never fall in love with you
Ichiban Tookute, Chikai Aitsu.: Kimi ni Koi wo Suru nante, Arienai Hazu Datta
一番遠くて、近いあいつ。～君に恋をするなんて、ありえないはずだった～
synopsis: Yasutaka Iijima, a boy wearing glasses, sits in the corner of the classroom and wants nothing to do with Ema Kitaoka, a popular gal in the same class. However, after a chance meeting at the school camping trip, they started talking with each other, but only outside of school. They are both unsure of each other's "true feelings." (Source: Comic Howl, translated)

title: Watashi Datte Seishun Shitai desu yo, Hontou wa.
titleRomaji: Watashi Datte Seishun Shitai desu yo, Hontou wa.
titleNative: 私だって青春したいですよ、本当は。
synonyms: The truth is, I want to enjoy my youth too.
I want to be young too, actually.
synopsis: Her hobbies are reading, and she's average at studying and sports. Otobe Murasaki is a high school student who lives a quiet life, thinking she's just a mob character, but she doesn't like Fujimi Akiko, who is always the center of attention in the class. However, as soon as she becomes a member of the gardening committee like Akiko, she quickly falls in love with her, as she talks to her in a friendly manner. Just as she is wondering if there's any way she can get closer to her, she happens to come across Akiko crying after a breakup... A girls' love comedy about a simple mob character and a sparkling girl with a difficult future ahead! (source: Ichijinsha, translated)

title: They Are Still Being Shaken This Morning
titleEnglish: They Are Still Being Shaken This Morning
titleNative: 今朝も揺られてます
synopsis: Every morning at 6:58, commuters hurry onto the train at Sakuranomiya Station. For the past few months, a tentative romance has been brewing between two students from different schools. The young man is easily flustered, always stealing a glance at the young woman, but never making a move—much to the disappointment of the other passengers, who have been cheering them on in secret. Will this budding love story ever blossom? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?
titleNative: 地雷なんですか？地原さん
synonyms: That Girl Is Cute... But Dangerous?
Jirai Nandesuka? Chihara-san
Chihara, es-tu une Jirai ?
synopsis: It’s the start of a new semester, and high school junior Kuroki finds himself seated beside the girl everyone whispers about: Mai Chihara. With her gothic fashion, jet-black hair, and intense stare, Chihara is said to be a “landmine” girl or jirai-kei, the hyper-feminine, dark aesthetic often associated with yandere tendencies and unstable personalities. But when Kuroki accidentally draws Chihara’s attention, he discovers she isn’t nearly as unstable as people claim. Beneath the intimidating aura is a surprisingly sweet girl… if a little weird. Hesitantly, Kuroki begins to learn more about Chihara and her strange quirks. Is there more to her than her volatile reputation? Or is all the dark clothing just a red flag in disguise? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleEnglish: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleNative: 社長と酒と星
synopsis: At 24, Reina Izutsu has recently become the new president of Izutsu Printing after taking over for her late father. Young and not quite experienced, Reina wants to do her best but unfortunately comes across as harsh with her employees. Stressed and feeling lost, Reina spends an evening drowning her sorrows in beer at an empty park. She rants and vents out loud to the starry sky that she wants to give up and quit being president, just letting off steam. Except, she fails to realize that her subordinate, 37-year-old section chief Kenichi Ishizumi, heard her drunken ramblings! But rather than use this against her, Kenichi finds himself charmed by the young woman. He vows then and there to support her and help her find her way as company president, no matter what! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
searchTerms: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
synonyms: Boss, Booze, and Bright Stars

title: Arelyn Is Sick and Tired
titleNative: 남주가 제 건강에 집착합니다
synonyms: Male Lead Is Obsessed With My Health
synopsis: The Caretakers' Council is a group of dedicated servants with only one goal: to nurse terminally ill Arelyn Halbern back to health. But Arelyn is already resigned to her fate, knowing she's simply an extra in a novel meant to die young. That is, until Crown Prince Pession Allermand takes an interest in her. Now, Pession visits Arelyn daily, nagging her to eat better, play, and be more active. With the novel's male lead lending his strength, can Arelyn finally find the will to fight her illness? (Source: Tapas)

title: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleNative: 木っ端舞い散る その頃に
synopsis: Kei Maebara gets a job!! The bizarre and eerie world of public service, depicted by Ryukishi07, from Higurashi When They Cry . In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region... Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to semi-criminal lifestyles has led to a drastic decline in public safety... Amidst all this, Kei Maebara begins working at the district office. Can he become a respectable public servant? (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

title: Real demo Shiawase ni Shite Kudasai ne?
titleRomaji: Real demo Shiawase ni Shite Kudasai ne?
titleNative: 現実世界でも幸せにしてくださいね？
synonyms: Be Happy in the Real World Too, Okay?
synopsis: High school girl Machino, who longs for the "love of destiny," loves to play the dating-sim game "Celestia." Despite maximizing the affection with all of the girls in the game, she can't decide on which one to choose for the confession event. After agonizing over the decision for days, an explosion occurs just as a shooting star flies over her house, and when Machino opens her eyes, she finds herself face to face with Sofia, the main heroine of Celestia.... "Machino... I always wanted to say it... I love you." An isekai summoning yuri harem romantic comedy begins, as her highly affectionate heroines jump into the real world! (Source: Ichijinsha, translated)

title: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleRomaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleNative: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
synonyms: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
synopsis: Satoshi Oosako is a 40-year-old unemployed man who becomes engrossed in the VR RPG "Sword and Sorcery" after being laid off from his job. In the game, he goes by the name Zeros Merlin and rises to become a top-ranked player. However, he suddenly dies in the middle of a long gaming session. To his surprise, Satoshi wakes up to find himself in a massive unfamiliar forest. He soon learns from the goddess of this world, who brought him here after his death, that he has been reincarnated with all of his in-game stats intact. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: The Jobless Guy Who Has Come to Slay
titleRomaji: Quanmin Zhuanzhi: Wuzhi de Wo Zhong Jie Le Shenming!
titleEnglish: The Jobless Guy Who Has Come to Slay
titleNative: 全民转职：无职的我终结了神明！
synonyms: 無職だが神を滅ぼした
Job Changing for the Entire Population: The Jobless Me Will Terminate the Gods
Tôi – Kẻ vô chức đã diệt thần
I'm A Loser And I Killed The Gods
synopsis: Facing a calamity that left chaos and destruction in its wake, mankind's survival was hanging in the balance. The only solution? Get a job and get good! Some became mages, other summoners. However, Cloud, a promising student with a great future ahead of him refused to get a job! Being jobless is his true calling! (Source: WebComics)
